## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Migration SQL included (if schema changed)
- [ ] Types updated end-to-end (shared → db → api → web)
- [ ] New routes registered in `app.ts`
